UPLINK Correction

July 1991
Journalism & Newsroom

A correction regarding leadership of the Palm Beach Post's computer-assisted reporting program, clarifying that Marie Dillon, deputy metro editor, heads the program rather than Special Projects Editor John Bartosek as previously stated.

The June UPLINK incorrectly identified Special Projects Editor John Bartosek as the person in charge of the Palm Beach Post computer-assisted reporting program. It is Marie Dillon, the paper's deputy metro editor, who heads the paper's computer-assisted reporting efforts. We regret the mistake.
